mainText:
Promo: Bank of Entitlement-where your every whim becomes our top priority! Why settle for less when you can have it all?

Visit Bank of Entitlement dot com for more.

ENTITLEMENT STORY: So, get this-last weekend, I waltzed into my local Bank of Entitlement branch, expecting the red carpet treatment as usual. But as I approached the teller, I noticed they were out of complimentary gold-plated pens! OUTRAGEOUS, I know. I immediately demanded to speak to the manager, Karen (bless her heart), and let me tell you, I gave her an earful. How dare they inconvenience me, the illustrious Hot Josh, with such negligence? I demanded a public apology, a full refund of my monthly banking fees, and a private performance by a string quartet in the bank lobby every Tuesday morning. Naturally, Karen was mortified and promised to rectify the situation immediately. And you know what? She did-every demand met, every need catered to. And as I strolled out of that bank, gold-plated pen in hand and the sweet sound of violins serenading my exit, I couldn't help but feel a warm glow of satisfaction. Because in my world, entitlement isn't just a mindset-it's a way of life. And boy, did it feel good.
